subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! In this mortal world, this heap of dust, and this realm of darkness, one truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله در این جهان فانی و خاکدان ترابی و عرصه ظلمانی یک حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
